picks.quote: I think Bam's going to beat Antonio. I like Antonio... I think minus400's insane.
Cardinus's game planning with should be based around that speed and patience... off jump, who do you like in this fight? Cardinz? Yes.
I feel like a passion of the torch moment... Perez going to get on the inside and he and he you know what I'm saying? Mama's coming up. This ain't 108 no more.
